name: Mr. Bean Hidden Stars
description: Play Mr. Bean Hidden Stars game online and for free. Find out the hidden stars in the specified images. Each level has 12 hidden stars. There are 12 levels in total. The time is limited so be fast and find all hidden objects before time runs out. Clicking in the wrong place several times reduces the time by an additional 5 seconds. So, if you are ready, start the game and have fun!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
